description_long: This object depicts a compact internet cafe setup, featuring a retro-style computer with a CRT monitor, a pastel-colored keyboard, and a matching mouse, all arranged on a dark wooden desk. The monitor displays a cluttered desktop interface with various open windows and a hand-drawn 'LOGO' sign beneath the screen, adding a playful, informal touch. The keyboard is colored in alternating blue, pink, and white keys, while the mouse is solid pink, both connected to the computer by visible cables. The computer case is boxy and white, with minimal external detailing except for a vent on the side and the aforementioned signage. The entire setup sits atop a rectangular wooden platform, suggesting a dedicated workstation. The overall aesthetic is whimsical and nostalgic, blending elements of early internet culture with a modern pastel palette.
description: A whimsical internet cafe workstation with a retro white computer, pastel keyboard and mouse, and a hand-drawn 'LOGO' sign, all set on a dark wooden desk.
description_view_0: Front view showing the computer monitor with a visible desktop interface, hand-drawn 'LOGO' sign, and the full pastel keyboard and mouse on the desk.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the computer case, the keyboard's colorful keys, and the mouse, with the monitor's screen not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the computer case and the wooden desk, with minimal visible features except the general shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the computer's side vent, the keyboard, and the mouse, with cables visible and the monitor screen turned away.
attribute_signage: A hand-drawn 'LOGO' sign in black marker is visible below the monitor screen, styled informally and placed on the computer case front.
attribute_computer_station_visibility: One computer station is fully visible, including the monitor, keyboard, and mouse, all arranged on a single desk.
